stories.title: CPSC Recall — Children's Sleepwear Burn Hazard: Bellabu Bear + Blossom Loungewear (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: RECALL: Bellabu Bear children's robes + Blossom children's loungewear both recalled for burn hazard. Both fail mandatory flammability standards for kids' sleepwear. Stop use now. Check cpsc.gov/Recalls for your model. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Bellabu Bear robes and Blossom loungewear are recalled — burn hazard. Both fail required flammability standards for children's sleepwear. Stop use now and check cpsc.gov/Recalls. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: CPSC Recalls Bellabu Bear Robes and Blossom Loungewear: Children's Sleepwear Burn Hazard

stories.title: CPSC Recall — Dangerous Infant Sleep Products: Joyful Journeys Lounger + Vevor Baby Swing (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Two infant sleep recalls: Joyful Journeys baby loungers (entrapment/fall) and Vevor baby swings (suffocation + inclined sleepers ban violation). Both pose serious injury or death risk. Check cpsc.gov/Recalls. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: The inclined sleepers ban exists because babies have died in products exactly like this. Vevor baby swings just joined the recall list — suffocation hazard, violates the ban. If you own one, stop use now. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Two Infant Sleep Product Recalls: Joyful Journeys Baby Lounger and Vevor Baby Swing

stories.title: This Weekend in COS — Spring Fling, RV Show, and Family Events Coming Up (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: This weekend in COS (April 10-11): Spring Fling at Pikes Peak Raceway in Fountain + free RV & Travel Show at 3960 Palmer Park Blvd. April 17: free early literacy event for families with deaf/hard-of-hearing kids at CSDB. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Garden of the Gods Is Getting Something New This Summer (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: Garden of the Gods is getting a new addition this summer — water-based, family-friendly, new view of the red rocks. Construction starts this spring, opening before summer 2026. COS families, watch for this. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: COS Spring Allergy Season — What Families Need to Know in April (Tier 3)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: April = peak tree pollen in Colorado Springs. Juniper, oak, cottonwood, pine — all active now. Pollen is highest in the morning. Plan outdoor time for afternoon. Check coloradoent.com for local COS counts. #COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: COS Allergy Season Guide for Families: What's in the Air This April in Colorado Springs
